name: io.github.dazzle-labs/dazzle
title: Dazzle
description: Cloud stages for AI agents and live streaming. Create, manage, and broadcast content.

environmentVariables.name: DAZZLE_STAGE
environmentVariables.description: Pin to a specific stage name or ID. If omitted, auto-selects when you have one stage.

environmentVariables.name: DAZZLE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for headless/CI use. Alternative to interactive login.

tools.name: cli
tools.description: Run a dazzle CLI command. Use ["--help"] to discover available commands. Output is JSON.

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Edit a file in the stage workspace by exact string replacement. The old_string must match exactly once in the file. Use read_file first to see the current content.

tools.name: guide
tools.description: Get the Dazzle quick-start guide — platform overview, setup, CLI basics, and links to full docs. Read this first before creating or modifying stage content.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List all files in the stage workspace (~/.dazzle/stages/{stage}/). Returns relative paths, one per line.

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read a file from the stage workspace (~/.dazzle/stages/{stage}/{path}).

tools.name: screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of the stage's current browser output. Returns a PNG image.

tools.name: sync
tools.description: Sync the stage workspace (~/.dazzle/stages/{stage}/) to the live stage. Run this after writing files to push content. Equivalent to 'dazzle stage sync {workspace-dir}'.

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Write a file to the stage workspace (~/.dazzle/stages/{stage}/{path}). Creates parent directories as needed. Use this to build up content that can then be synced to the stage.

resources.description: Complete Dazzle reference — getting started, CLI help, and content authoring guide.
Dazzle quick-start guide — platform overview, setup, CLI basics, and doc links.
